name: I got hurt on a machine at work in Salt Lake City, what do I do right now?
description: Report injury to employer immediately in writing, seek medical care, document everything, and contact a workers' comp attorney.

mainEntity.name: I got hurt on a machine at work in Salt Lake City, what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report injury to employer immediately in writing, seek medical care, document everything, and contact a workers' comp attorney.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Immediately report the injury to your supervisor or HR in writing and seek medical attention at an approved clinic.** Utah workers' comp requires prompt reporting to preserve your claim, as delays can lead to denial[1][4]. Key factors include documenting the incident details, getting treated for injuries like fractures or lacerations from machinery, and avoiding employer discussions without advice. Notify within 180 days but act fast; photograph the machine and scene. Follow up with a workers' comp attorney to file properly. Consult a specialist for best outcomes.
